chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 133 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25. 2. For orders on CMA No.1024/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1025/2019. 29.10.2025 Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sanaullah Abro, Director, I&I (Customs), Karachi. Under instructions, counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
